industry: Information Technology,Agriculture Forestry Animal Husbandry & Fishery,Energy & Manufacturing

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Object detection accuracy exceeds 92%: Key targets can still be identified stably in complex backgrounds
- False-damage and false-alarm rate <=5%: Significantly lower than the traditional full-coverage mode
- P99 latency controlled within 30ms: About 15% faster than YOLOv8 and suitable for real-time operations
- Resource input saved by 50%-80%: Precise positioning replaces full-area coverage strategies

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: As a core technology in computer vision, object detection is widely used in fields such as traffic navigation, security monitoring, medical imaging, agriculture, forestry, animal husbandry, and more. Among these tasks, "complex backgrounds, tiny targets, and high similarity between interference objects" are typical challenges.

**Solution**: The proposed solution builds a general object detection workflow containing modules such as image acquisition, precise recognition, and data feedback. It uses the YOLOv11 algorithm combined with an Active Learning mechanism to automatically capture low-confidence samples and trigger model iteration, solving the problem of performance degradation after deployment due to environmental changes.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Agriculture Forestry Animal Husbandry & Fishery, Energy & Manufacturing
**Category**: Operations, Management, Risk Control
**Technology Category**: Computer Vision (CV), Operations (Testing & Monitoring), Data Governance, MLOps

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: <=5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm expert, 1 MLOps engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - High cost of full-scale processing: When target objects such as defects, weeds, or specific products account for only 10%-30% of the area, existing solutions mostly use full-area coverage, causing more than 70% of resources to be wasted

- Misidentification of extremely similar targets: When target objects are highly similar to backgrounds or non-target objects such as mimetic interference objects, manual methods or existing solutions are prone to misjudgment, causing serious business losses such as damaging crops or missing defective products

- Sunk data loses its value: Traditional operations lack data retention, so massive on-site operational data, especially edge and anomalous samples, is not converted into data assets, seriously affecting the model's learning and judgment capability

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Precise target filtering: Can locate designated targets in millisecond time from large-area complex backgrounds, replacing the full-coverage mode and reducing cost
- Fine-grained hierarchical classification: Uses a multi-level classification system to improve recognition accuracy for interference items with extremely similar forms and reduce usage risk
- Automatic data collection: Automatically captures high-value long-tail data backups during operations without manual intervention, accumulating data assets

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - More accurate detection: Average detection precision mAP@0.5 exceeds 92%, enabling effective recognition of tiny targets and objects in complex backgrounds.
- Lower false positives: False damage/false alarm rate for key targets <=5%, clearly better than the traditional full-coverage mode.
- Faster response: P99 inference latency is controlled within 30ms, about 15% faster than the previous-generation general model.
- More efficient resource use: The precise positioning strategy can reduce input cost for pesticides, reagents, and similar resources by 50%-80%.

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Save 50%-80% in resource input: Resources such as pesticide input are applied only to precisely localized and narrowed target areas, greatly reducing consumables and operating cost

- Long-tail sample data asset conversion rate 98%: Automatically filters and retains difficult long-tail samples such as low-confidence results and conflicting results for subsequent system training and upgrades, reducing useless data accumulation and storage occupation while lowering operations cost
- False damage/false alarm rate for key targets <=5%: In highly confusing scenarios, this protects non-target objects such as healthy crops and is estimated to prevent 10%-15% of total property loss
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Average detection precision (mAP@0.5) > 92%
